data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, or speech bubbles.

data.label: Action
data.content: Map of the United States as a stylized illustration, with kava bar locations marked as glowing points across multiple states. Florida prominently lit as the origin point. Lines connecting cities like a network. Tropical leaf motifs framing the edges. Sense of expansion and growth, warm tones spreading across the country.
